pages.title: Problem: "Can't craft PreFab Upgrade Template"
pages.text: $(bold)Solution$(): $(li)Check JEI (Just Enough Items) for recipe $(li)Ensure all materials are available $(li)Recipe may require specific mod progression

pages.title: Problem: "Right-clicking CM with PreFab Upgrade Template doesn't work"
pages.text: $(bold)Checklist$(): $(li)[DONE] CM block placed in world (not in inventory) $(li)[DONE] Holding PreFab Upgrade Template item $(li)[DONE] Right-clicking (not shift-right-clicking) $(li)[DONE] Not in spectator / adventure mode

pages.title: Problem: "Face Configuration GUI won't open"
pages.text: $(bold)Cause$(): Not using correct method$(br2)$(bold)Solution$(): $(li)Hold Simulation Wrench (not PreFab Upgrade Template) $(li)$(bold)Right-click$() PreFab $(li)Make sure PreFab is placed (not just CM)$(br2)---
